sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_NAME name, PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID=#TENANTID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME=#name# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#

isNotEmpty.isEqual: ( STATUS LIKE 'Y' OR STATUS LIKE '' OR STATUS IS NULL )

sqlMap.select:
SELECT X.rnum, TO_CHAR((X.CONNECTTIME + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CONNECTTIME, CASE WHEN X.DISCONNECTTIME IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR((X.DISCONNECTTIME + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE TO_CHAR(' ') END AS DISCONNECTTIME, X."SEQUENCE", X.USERNM, X.USERNM2, X.DEPTNM, X.DEPTNM2, X.CONNECTIP, X.CONNECTBROWSER, X.CONNECTOS, X.COMPANYID, X.COMPANYNM, X.COMPANYNM2, X.USERID, X.STATUS FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A.CONNECTTIME, A.DISCONNECTTIME, A."SEQUENCE", A.USERNM, A.USERNM2, A.DEPTNM, A.DEPTNM2, A.CONNECTIP, A.CONNECTBROWSER, A.CONNECTOS, A.COMPANYID, A.COMPANYNM, A.COMPANYNM2, A.USERID, A.STATUS FROM ( SELECT C.CONNECTTIME, C.DISCONNECTTIME, C."SEQUENCE", C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.CONNECTIP, C.CONNECTBROWSER, C.CONNECTOS, C.COMPANYID, C.COMPANYNM, C.COMPANYNM2, C.USERID, C.STATUS FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\'
ORDER BY C."SEQUENCE" DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= (#pageCount# + #v_start#)
) X
WHERE X.rnum >= (#v_start# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\'

SELECT X.rnum, TO_CHAR((X.CONNECTTIME + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CONNECTTIME, CASE WHEN X.DISCONNECTTIME IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR((X.DISCONNECTTIME + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') ELSE TO_CHAR(' ') END AS DISCONNECTTIME, X."SEQUENCE", X.USERNM, X.USERNM2, X.DEPTNM, X.DEPTNM2, X.CONNECTIP, X.CONNECTBROWSER, X.CONNECTOS, X.USERID, X.STATUS FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A.CONNECTTIME, A.DISCONNECTTIME, A."SEQUENCE", A.USERNM, A.USERNM2, A.DEPTNM, A.DEPTNM2, A.CONNECTIP, A.CONNECTBROWSER, A.CONNECTOS, A.USERID, A.STATUS FROM ( SELECT C.CONNECTTIME, C.DISCONNECTTIME, C."SEQUENCE", C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.CONNECTIP, C.CONNECTBROWSER, C.CONNECTOS, C.USERID, C.STATUS FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND C.USERID = #userId#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
ORDER BY C."SEQUENCE" DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= (#pageCount# + #v_start#)
) X
WHERE X.rnum >= (#v_start# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID# AND C.USERID = #userId#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CONNECTTIME < sysdate - #v_KEEP_LOG_PERIOD#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME='useIPAccess' AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPNO, IPADDRESS, "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT TBL_ACCESS_IP_SEQ2.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_ACCESS_IP (IPNO, TENANT_ID, IPADDRESS, "ACCESS", EXPLANATION) VALUES (#id#, #tenantID#, #ipAddress#, #access#, #explanation#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ACCESS_IP SET IPADDRESS=#ipAddress#, "ACCESS"=#access#, EXPLANATION=#explanation# WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPADDRESS, "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ACCESS_IP WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.ACCESSNO, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.DISPLAYNAME END AS NAME, TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION2 ELSE TBL_USERMASTER.DESCRIPTION END AS DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN = TBL_USERMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ACCESS_ID.TENANT_ID

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.ACCESSNO, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME END AS NAME, TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN CN, CASE #lang# WHEN '2' THEN TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME2 ELSE TBL_DEPTMASTER.DISPLAYNAME END AS DEPARTMENT FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN = TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = #companyID# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ACCESS_ID.TENANT_ID

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN=TBL_DEPTMASTER.CN AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID=#tenantID# AND TBL_DEPTMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ACCESS_ID.TENANT_ID

SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN FROM TBL_ACCESS_ID INNER JOIN TBL_USERMASTER ON TBL_ACCESS_ID.CN=TBL_USERMASTER.CN AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID=#tenantID# AND TBL_USERMASTER.TENANT_ID = TBL_ACCESS_ID.TENANT_ID
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT TBL_ACCESS_ID_SEQ2.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_ACCESS_ID (ACCESSNO, TENANT_ID, CN) VALUES (#id#, #tenantID#, #cn#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT SUM(MODULESIZE) AS MODULESIZE FROM ( SELECT SUM(AVG_ROW_LEN * NUM_ROWS) AS MODULESIZE FROM USER_TABLES WHERE REGEXP_LIKE (UPPER(TABLE_NAME), UPPER(#tableNames#))
AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (UPPER(TABLE_NAME), UPPER(#notTableNames#))
UNION SELECT SUM(BYTES) AS MODULESIZE FROM USER_SEGMENTS A JOIN USER_INDEXES B ON A.SEGMENT_NAME = B.INDEX_NAME WHERE REGEXP_LIKE (UPPER(TABLE_NAME), UPPER(#tableNames#))
AND NOT REGEXP_LIKE (UPPER(TABLE_NAME), UPPER(#notTableNames#))
)
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND CREATE_DATE < sysdate - #v_KEEP_LOG_PERIOD#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE) VALUES (#tenantID#, #companyID#, 'useMultiLogin', #multiLoginType#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #multiLoginType# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND PROPERTY_NAME = 'useMultiLogin'

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU_COMP SET MENU_USED = #menuUse# WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
MENU_ID IN
#menuId[]#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNTRY_CODE COUNTRYCODE FROM TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY SET COUNTRY_CODE = #countryCode# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPNO, IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS AS "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP_SEQ2.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP (IPNO, TENANT_ID, IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS, EXPLANATION) VALUES (#id#, #tenantID#, #ipAddress#, #access#, #explanation#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP SET IPADDRESS=#ipAddress#, ALLOW_ACCESS=#access#, EXPLANATION=#explanation# WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS AS "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#

SELECT count(IPNO) FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP
#ipNoList[]# AND ALLOW_ACCESS ='YES'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE) VALUES (#tenantID#, #companyID#, #name#, #value# )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_COMPANY_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#value# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME=#name# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantID# AND COMPANY_ID=#companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, ENG_CHAR_TYPE, USE_ENG_CAPITAL_LETTER, USE_ENG_SMALL_LETTER, USE_NUMBER, USE_SPECIAL_CHAR FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
SELECT TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, USE_PATTERN_COUNT, NUMBER_OF_CHAR FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY_PATTERN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, ENG_CHAR_TYPE, USE_ENG_CAPITAL_LETTER, USE_ENG_SMALL_LETTER, USE_NUMBER, USE_SPECIAL_CHAR) VALUES (#tenantId#, #companyId#, #engCharType#, #useCapitalLetter#, #useSmallLetter#, #useNumber#, #useSpecial#)
INSERT INTO TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY_PATTERN (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, USE_PATTERN_COUNT, NUMBER_OF_CHAR) VALUES (#tenantId#, #companyId#, #settingCnt#, #settingNumber#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY SET ENG_CHAR_TYPE=#engCharType#, USE_ENG_CAPITAL_LETTER=#useCapitalLetter#, USE_ENG_SMALL_LETTER=#useSmallLetter#, USE_NUMBER=#useNumber#, USE_SPECIAL_CHAR=#useSpecial# WHERE TENANT_ID=#tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID=#companyId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY_PATTERN WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID=#companyId#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT X.rnum, TO_CHAR((X.ACCESSTIME + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ACCESSTIME, X."SEQUENCE", X.USERNM, X.USERNM2, X.DEPTNM, X.DEPTNM2, X.ACCESSIP, X.ACCESSBROWSER, X.ACCESSOS, X.COMPANYID, X.COMPANYNM, X.COMPANYNM2, X.USERID, X.ADMINTYPE FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A.ACCESSTIME, A."SEQUENCE", A.USERNM, A.USERNM2, A.DEPTNM, A.DEPTNM2, A.ACCESSIP, A.ACCESSBROWSER, A.ACCESSOS, A.COMPANYID, A.COMPANYNM, A.COMPANYNM2, A.USERID, A.ADMINTYPE FROM ( SELECT C.ACCESSTIME, C."SEQUENCE", C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.ACCESSIP, C.ACCESSBROWSER, C.ACCESSOS, C.COMPANYID, C.COMPANYNM, C.COMPANYNM2, C.USERID, C.ADMINTYPE FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\'
ORDER BY C."SEQUENCE" DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= (#pageCount# + #v_start#)
) X
WHERE X.rnum >= (#v_start# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\'

SELECT X.rnum, TO_CHAR((X.AUTHORIZEDTIME + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS AUTHORIZEDTIME, X."SEQUENCE", X.USERID, X.USERNM, X.USERNM2, X.DEPTNM, X.DEPTNM2, X.COMPANYID, X.COMPANYNM, X.COMPANYNM2, X.ADMINTYPE, X.STATUS, X.AUTHORIZERID, X.AUTHORIZERNM, X.AUTHORIZERNM2, X.AUTHORIZERIP FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A.AUTHORIZEDTIME, A."SEQUENCE", A.USERID, A.USERNM, A.USERNM2, A.DEPTNM, A.DEPTNM2, A.COMPANYID, A.COMPANYNM, A.COMPANYNM2, A.ADMINTYPE, A.STATUS, A.AUTHORIZERID, A.AUTHORIZERNM, A.AUTHORIZERNM2, A.AUTHORIZERIP FROM ( SELECT C.AUTHORIZEDTIME, C."SEQUENCE", C.USERID, C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.COMPANYID, C.COMPANYNM, C.COMPANYNM2, C.ADMINTYPE, C.STATUS, C.AUTHORIZERID, C.AUTHORIZERNM, C.AUTHORIZERNM2, C.AUTHORIZERIP FROM TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\'
ORDER BY C."SEQUENCE" DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= (#pageCount# + #v_start#)
) X
WHERE X.rnum >= (#v_start# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE) FROM TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO C WHERE C.TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND C.USERID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\'
SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND PROPERTY_NAME like 'USE_FileExtension'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE=#fileExtension# WHERE PROPERTY_NAME='USE_FileExtension' AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_USER_CHANGE_INFO (SEQ, USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, UPDATEDT, TARGET_DEPTID, TARGET_DEPTNM, TARGET_DEPTNM2, UPDATE_TYPE, EXECUTORID, EXECUTORNM, EXECUTORNM2, EXECUTORIP, TENANTID) (SELECT SEQ_TBL_USER_CHANGE_INFO.NEXTVAL, CN, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2,
#deptId#, #deptNm#, #deptNm2#,
DEPARTMENT, DESCRIPTION, DESCRIPTION2,
PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME, COMPANY, COMPANY2,
to_date(#updatedt#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'),
UPDATEDT,
#targetDeptId#, #targetDeptNm#, #targetDeptNm2#, #updateType#, #executorId#, #executorNm#, #executorNm2#, #executorIp#, TENANT_ID FROM
TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE
TBL_USERMASTER_DELETE
TBL_USERMASTER
WHERE CN = #userId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#)

isEqual.isEqual: EXECUTORID <> 'ez_sync' AND (EXECUTORID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\' OR EXECUTORNM2 LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\')

isNotEqual.isEqual: EXECUTORID <> 'ez_sync' AND (EXECUTORID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\' OR EXECUTORNM LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\')

sqlMap.select:
SELECT X.rnum, TO_CHAR((X.UPDATEDT + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATEDT, X."SEQ", X.USERID, X.USERNM, X.USERNM2, X.DEPTID, X.DEPTNM, X.DEPTNM2, X.COMPANYID, X.COMPANYNM, X.COMPANYNM2, X.UPDATEDT, X.TARGETDEPTID, X.TARGETDEPTNM, X.TARGETDEPTNM2, X.UPDATETYPE, X.EXECUTORID, X.EXECUTORNM, X.EXECUTORNM2, X.EXECUTORIP FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A."SEQ", A.USERID, A.USERNM, A.USERNM2, A.DEPTID, A.DEPTNM, A.DEPTNM2, A.COMPANYID, A.COMPANYNM, A.COMPANYNM2, A.UPDATEDT, A.TARGETDEPTID, A.TARGETDEPTNM, A.TARGETDEPTNM2, A.UPDATETYPE, A.EXECUTORID, A.EXECUTORNM, A.EXECUTORNM2, A.EXECUTORIP FROM ( SELECT C."SEQ", C.USERID, C.USERNM, C.USERNM2, C.DEPTID, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.COMPANYID, C.COMPANYNM, C.COMPANYNM2, C.UPDATEDT, C.TARGET_DEPTID AS targetDeptId, C.TARGET_DEPTNM AS targetDeptNm, C.TARGET_DEPTNM2 AS targetDeptNm2, C.UPDATE_TYPE AS updateType, C.EXECUTORID, C.EXECUTORNM, C.EXECUTORNM2, C.EXECUTORIP FROM TBL_USER_CHANGE_INFO C WHERE C.TENANTID = #v_tenantID#
AND C.COMPANYID = #companyId#
ORDER BY C."SEQ" DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= (#pageCount# + #v_start#)
) X
WHERE X.rnum >= (#v_start# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(SEQ) FROM TBL_USER_CHANGE_INFO WHERE TENANTID = #v_tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO (SEQ, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, PARENT_DEPTID, PARENT_DEPTNM, PARENT_DEPTNM2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2, UPDATEDT, TARGET_DEPTID, TARGET_DEPTNM, TARGET_DEPTNM2, UPDATE_TYPE, EXECUTORID, EXECUTORNM, EXECUTORNM2, EXECUTORIP, TENANTID) SELECT SEQ_TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO.NEXTVAL, #deptId#, #deptNm#, #deptNm2#, #parentDeptId#, DISPLAYNAME, DISPLAYNAME2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2, EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3, COMPNM2, to_date(#updatedt#, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI:SS'), #targetDeptId#, #targetDeptNm#, #targetDeptNm2#, #updateType#, #executorId#, #executorNm#, #executorNm2#, #executorIp#, #tenantId# FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER WHERE CN=#parentDeptId# AND TENANT_ID=#tenantId#

isEqual.isEqual: EXECUTORID <> 'ez_sync' AND (EXECUTORID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\' OR EXECUTORNM2 LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\')

isNotEqual.isEqual: EXECUTORID <> 'ez_sync' AND (EXECUTORID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\' OR EXECUTORNM LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\')

sqlMap.select:
SELECT X.rnum, TO_CHAR((X.UPDATEDT + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATEDT, X."SEQ", X.DEPTID, X.DEPTNM, X.DEPTNM2, X.PARENTDEPTID, X.PARENTDEPTNM, X.PARENTDEPTNM2, X.COMPANYID, X.COMPANYNM, X.COMPANYNM2, X.UPDATEDT, X.TARGETDEPTID, X.TARGETDEPTNM, X.TARGETDEPTNM2, X.UPDATETYPE, X.EXECUTORID, X.EXECUTORNM, X.EXECUTORNM2, X.EXECUTORIP FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A."SEQ", A.DEPTID, A.DEPTNM, A.DEPTNM2, A.PARENTDEPTID, A.PARENTDEPTNM, A.PARENTDEPTNM2, A.COMPANYID, A.COMPANYNM, A.COMPANYNM2, A.UPDATEDT, A.TARGETDEPTID, A.TARGETDEPTNM, A.TARGETDEPTNM2, A.UPDATETYPE, A.EXECUTORID, A.EXECUTORNM, A.EXECUTORNM2, A.EXECUTORIP FROM ( SELECT C."SEQ", C.DEPTID, C.DEPTNM, C.DEPTNM2, C.PARENT_DEPTID AS parentDeptId, C.PARENT_DEPTNM AS parentDeptNm, C.PARENT_DEPTNM2 AS parentDeptNm2, C.COMPANYID, C.COMPANYNM, C.COMPANYNM2, C.UPDATEDT, C.TARGET_DEPTID AS targetDeptId, C.TARGET_DEPTNM AS targetDeptNm, C.TARGET_DEPTNM2 AS targetDeptNm2, C.UPDATE_TYPE AS updateType, C.EXECUTORID, C.EXECUTORNM, C.EXECUTORNM2, C.EXECUTORIP FROM TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO C WHERE C.TENANTID = #v_tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
ORDER BY C."SEQ" DESC ) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= (#pageCount# + #v_start#)
) X
WHERE X.rnum >= (#v_start# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(SEQ) FROM TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO WHERE TENANTID = #v_tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#

SELECT * FROM (SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, COMPANYID ,COMPANYNM , COMPANYNM2 FROM (SELECT USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2,COMPANYID ,COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2 FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND (STATUS LIKE 'Y' OR STATUS LIKE '' OR STATUS IS NULL)
AND USERID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\'
GROUP BY USERID, USERNM, USERNM2, DEPTID, DEPTNM, DEPTNM2, COMPANYID, COMPANYNM, COMPANYNM2 ORDER BY USERNM) A
WHERE ROWNUM <= (#pageCount# + #v_start#)
) B
WHERE RNUM >= (#v_start# + 1)

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT USERID FROM TBL_CONNECTION_INFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_tenantID#
AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
AND (STATUS LIKE 'Y' OR STATUS like '' OR STATUS IS NULL)
AND USERID LIKE '%'||#search_keyword#||'%' ESCAPE '\'
GROUP BY USERID) A
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER WHERE USED_FRAME != 1 AND USED_FRAME != 5 AND USED_FRAME != 8
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_USER SET IS_DEFAULT = CASE WHEN USED_FRAME = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_FRAME_COMP SET FRAME_USED = CASE WHEN FRAME_ID = 1 OR FRAME_ID = 5 OR FRAME_ID = 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, FRAME_DEFAULT = CASE WHEN FRAME_ID = 1 OR FRAME_ID = 5 OR FRAME_ID = 8 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(CODE) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE CODE IS NOT NULL
AND TYPECODE = #typeCode#
AND (CODE LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%' OR CODEVALUE LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%' OR DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%')
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#

SELECT COUNT(CODE) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE CODE IS NOT NULL
AND TYPECODE = #typeCode#
AND (CODE LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%' OR CODEVALUE LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%' OR DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%')
AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, C.* FROM ( SELECT A.CODE, A.CODEVALUE, A.DESCRIPTION, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, TO_CHAR((A.WRITEDATE + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, A.TYPECODE, B.TYPENAME, B.TYPENAME2, A.ISDELETEBLOCK AS isDeleteBlock FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG A INNER JOIN TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE B ON A.TYPECODE = B.TYPECODE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID WHERE A.CODE IS NOT NULL
AND A.TYPECODE = #typeCode#
AND (A.CODE LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%' OR A.CODEVALUE LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%' OR A.DESCRIPTION LIKE '%' || #searchValue# || '%')
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
ORDER BY A.WRITEDATE DESC ) C WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_STARTNUM# + #v_COUNT# ) WHERE RNUM > #v_STARTNUM#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, C.* FROM ( SELECT A.CODE, A.CODEVALUE, A.DESCRIPTION, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, TO_CHAR((A.WRITEDATE + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, A.TYPECODE, B.TYPENAME, B.TYPENAME2 FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG A INNER JOIN TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE B ON A.TYPECODE = B.TYPECODE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID WHERE A.CODE IS NOT NULL
AND A.TYPECODE = #typeCode#
AND (A.CODE LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' OR A.CODEVALUE LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' OR A.DESCRIPTION LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%')
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyID# ORDER BY A.WRITEDATE DESC ) C WHERE ROWNUM <= #v_STARTNUM# + #v_COUNT# ) WHERE RNUM > #v_STARTNUM#

SELECT A.CODE, A.CODEVALUE, A.DESCRIPTION, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME, TO_CHAR((A.WRITEDATE + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, A.TYPECODE, B.TYPENAME, B.TYPENAME2 FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG A INNER JOIN TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE B ON A.TYPECODE = B.TYPECODE AND A.TENANT_ID = B.TENANT_ID AND A.COMPANY_ID = B.COMPANY_ID WHERE A.CODE IS NOT NULL
AND A.CODE = #CODE#
AND A.TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND A.COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE CODE = #CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID# AND ISDELETEBLOCK <> 'Y'
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG (CODE, CODEVALUE, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, TYPECODE) VALUES(#CODE#, #CODEVALUE#, #DESCRIPTION#, #WRITERID#, #WRITERNAME#, TO_DATE(#WRITEDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #v_TENANT_ID#, #companyID#, #typeCode#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG SET CODEVALUE = #CODEVALUE#, DESCRIPTION = #DESCRIPTION#, WRITERID = #WRITERID#, WRITERNAME = #WRITERNAME#, WRITEDATE = TO_DATE(#WRITEDATE#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE CODE = #CODE# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, C.* FROM (
SELECT DISTINCT TYPECODE AS TYPECODE, TYPENAME, TYPENAME2, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR((WRITEDATE + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
AND (TYPECODE LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' OR TYPENAME LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' OR TYPENAME2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' OR DESCRIPTION LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%')
ORDER BY WRITEDATE DESC
) C WHERE ROWNUM <= #startRow# + #pageSize# ) WHERE RNUM > #startRow#

SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID#
AND (TYPECODE LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' OR TYPENAME LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' OR TYPENAME2 LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%' OR DESCRIPTION LIKE '%'||#searchValue#||'%')
AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE CODE = #code# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT TYPECODE, TYPENAME, TYPENAME2, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, TO_CHAR((WRITEDATE + #offset# / (24 * 60)),'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANT_ID# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE (TYPECODE, TYPENAME, TYPENAME2, DESCRIPTION, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, WRITEDATE, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID) VALUES(#typeCode#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, #description#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, TO_DATE(#writeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #tenantId#, #companyId#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG_TYPE SET TYPENAME = #typeName#, TYPENAME2 = #typeName2#, DESCRIPTION = #description#, WRITERID = #writerId#, WRITERNAME = #writerName#, WRITERNAME2 = #writerName2#, WRITEDATE = TO_DATE(#writeDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE TYPECODE = #typeCode# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
UPDATE TBL_SYSTEMCONFIG SET ISDELETEBLOCK = 'Y' WHERE CODE = #code# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND COMPANY_ID = #companyId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT IPNO, IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS AS "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyId#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# AND COMPANYID = #companyId# AND IPADDRESS = #ipAddress# AND ALLOW_ACCESS = 'YES'
SELECT IPADDRESS, ALLOW_ACCESS AS "ACCESS", EXPLANATION FROM TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_NOT_ACCESS_FIDO_IP SET IPADDRESS=#ipAddress#, ALLOW_ACCESS=#access#, EXPLANATION=#explanation# WHERE IPNO=#ipNo#
